name: planner routes aws audit request
message: please audit my aws account in us-east-2 with sts
plannerResponse: {"action":"use_tool","toolName":"aws_region_audit","arguments":{"region":"us-east-2","services":["sts"]},"missingFields":[],"reason":"The user explicitly asked for an AWS audit."}

name: planner asks for bucket clarification
message: check s3 cloudwatch metrics for the last 7 days
plannerResponse: {"action":"clarification_needed","toolName":"s3_cloudwatch_report","arguments":{"days":7},"missingFields":["bucket"],"reason":"Bucket metrics request is missing the bucket name."}

name: malformed planner output falls back to rules
message: run aws audit for us-east-2 sts

name: planner keeps normal chat as none
message: explain recursion using a simple example
